game_info.title: Neon Hop
game_info.concept:
Bounce off tiles and make as many hops as you can in this mind-blowing arcade action!

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/hop/id1154436120

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Bounce off tiles and make as many hops as you can in this mind-blowing arcade action!

Touch the screen and drag left or right to guide the ball from tile to tile. Don’t miss the path! Make insane combos and beat your friend's scores!

What is your best score?
game_info.description: Neon Hop is a fast-paced arcade rhythm platformer. You control a glowing ball bouncing along a procedurally generated path of neon tiles in a void. The ball hops forward automatically; your goal is to steer left and right to land on the tiles. Missing a tile plunges you into the abyss. Collect crystals for extra points and aim for the finish line at 1000 meters to win!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left / A: Steer Left
- Arrow Right / D: Steer Right
- Space: Boost Jump (Mid-air only)
- Enter: Start Game
- R: Restart Game
- Esc: Pause/Resume

TEST_1.test_description: Verify basic movement and survival logic.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The automated controller will detect the X position of the next immediate tile and steer the player towards it to land safely.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player survives for at least 10 hops without falling off the path.

TEST_2.strategy_description: The automated controller will play perfectly, steering towards the center of every tile and using boost if necessary to reach the 1000 unit mark.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player reaches the finish line and the game state transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN.

TEST_3.strategy_description: The controller will intentionally steer hard right into the void immediately after start.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player Y position drops below threshold, triggering GAME_OVER_LOSE state.
